name: mcp-forge-mcp
description: Meta MCP server that generates other MCP servers — the factory that builds factories

tools.name: generate_server
tools.description: Generate a complete MCP server package from a name, description, and tool definitions. Returns package.json, tsconfig.json, src/index.ts, README.md, and mcpize.yaml.

tools.name: list_templates
tools.description: List available pre-built MCP server templates with their included tools.

tools.name: generate_from_template
tools.description: Generate a complete MCP server from a pre-built template (utility, converter, generator, validator).
